name: deeptools-lx-coordinate-remap
purpose: Record Deeptools-side support required by Torch LXCoordinateRemapOp mixed SDSCs.

artifacts.description: Adds ranged LXCoordinateRemapOp parsing and PCFG lowering for whole-stick LX-to-LX movement.

changed_files.reason: Lower LXCoordinateRemapOp movement ranges to L3 ring transfer PCFG nodes.
Import and validate LXCoordinateRemapOp movement and movementRange payloads.
Declare LXCoordinateRemapOp payload fields, including range encoding.

artifacts.description: WIP end-to-end Deeptools changes for DCC LX transfer handling, address pinning, register assignment, and backend codegen. Preserve as context, not as the clean candidate patch.
Small mixed-SDSC example with one LXCoordinateRemapOp row scheduled before a consumer DL row.

validation.runtime_expectation: DXP imports mixed datadscs_ plus dscs_ SDSCs, routes through data-op/DL DCG, lowers LXCoordinateRemapOp to L3 ring send/receive movement, and preserves coreIdToDscSchedule ordering.
